content: I love this place!
Best kava bar ever!!!!!
sick spot!! love the people and the products 😁☀️

I can’t say enough good things about Twin Flame Kava. The vibe is always chill—walking in feels like stepping into a little oasis of calm. The drinks are fantastic, and I love that they offer sugar-free options for those of us watching our intake. But the real standout? Their banana kava. It’s outrageously amazing, one of the best flavors I’ve ever tried anywhere. From the owners to the kavatenders, everyone makes you feel right at home. They care about their craft and their customers. This place is it if you’re looking for a laid-back spot with top-notch kava and welcoming vibes.

If you’re looking for a laid-back hangout with a modern, upbeat vibe, Kava Point should be at the top of your list. This place brings together everything you need for a chill and enjoyable time. Whether you’re there to relax, socialize, or just try something new, Kava Point delivers on all fronts.

They offer a solid variety of kava and kratom options, perfect for anyone looking to unwind or enjoy a mellow, calming experience. For those looking for something a bit more playful, their selection of mocktails is surprisingly creative and refreshing—perfect for enjoying a night out without the buzz of alcohol.

Beyond the drinks, the atmosphere really sets this spot apart. With just the right lighting mixed with the curated music gives off a trendy, hip vibe that makes you want to stay awhile. Plus, the entertainment options are a major bonus. You can challenge your friends to a game on their air hockey table or shoot some pool on their well-maintained pool table—both of which add a fun, interactive edge to the experience.

What really surprised me was their full smoke shop inside, offering a solid range of products for those who enjoy that scene. It’s super convenient and adds another layer of versatility to what this place has to offer.

Overall, Kava Point isn’t just a spot to grab a drink—it’s a full experience. Whether you’re unwinding solo, hanging out with friends, or looking for a fun date spot, this place hits the mark with its chill energy, great drinks, and plenty of entertainment options. Definitely worth checking out!

Sunbelt Kava: A Hidden Gem in Broward County

Sunbelt Kava is one of the newest kava spots in Broward County, and it’s already making a strong impression. From the moment you walk in, the ambiance is just right: well-balanced lighting, an aesthetically pleasing design, and a clean, inviting atmosphere with a subtle, pleasant aroma. It’s the kind of place that immediately puts you at ease.

The service was top-notch, with Kavatender Dan Doon providing a warm welcome and engaging in friendly conversation. He was knowledgeable about the kava offerings and made the experience even more enjoyable.

During my visit, they had Kalo Kava on the menu, which is a rarity, according to Dan. It was one of the strongest kavas I’ve ever had, with a smooth, rich taste that stood out from many other kava blends I’ve tried. While it may not always be available, if you see it on the menu, don’t hesitate to try it!

Sunbelt Kava has all the makings of a great kava bar, relaxing vibes, excellent service, and high-quality kava. If you’re in Broward County and looking for a new spot to unwind, this place is worth checking out. I’ll be back for sure!

I deeply enjoy my time at Twin Flames. The vibes are always incredible and the food is actually great compared to other bars! Plus the banana Kava is amazing. Clara is also such an incredible kavatender. She makes everyone feel so welcomed and she's got great attention to detail, remembering everyone's name. Leticia, the owner, is also so sweet! It feels like she's welcoming you into her home. Awesome vibes here. Definitely check it out!

Review for Tribe Tea Lounge

Tribe Tea Lounge is a solid spot if you’re looking for a quiet and relaxing place to hang out or get some work done. Unlike other kava bars that blast loud music, Tribe keeps the vibe chill, making it a great spot to focus, have a conversation, or just unwind.

One of the coolest features is the big tree in the center of the bar, which adds to the relaxed atmosphere. The drinks are good, and the kavatenders are always friendly, laid-back, and quick with service. If you’re looking for a low-key, comfortable kava bar, Tribe is definitely worth checking out.

Chillers Kava & Coffee may be a small bar, but it left a big impression on me. I ordered the Bananas Foster kava drink, and I can’t even put into words how good it was—absolutely delicious!\n\nThe vibe here is super chill, making it a great spot to relax and enjoy a quality drink. The atmosphere is inviting, and you can tell they put a lot of care into their menu. I’ll definitely be coming back for more. Highly recommend checking this place out!

We visited The Hideout Kava & Tea in Boynton Beach for the first time on a Friday night, and it was an experience worth sharing. The place was packed, with a dimly lit, cozy atmosphere that gave it a chill yet lively vibe. The energy was definitely bumping, making it feel like a true community spot where regulars and newcomers alike could enjoy the night.

One of the standout features (and often missed) was the seating—super comfortable, perfect for settling in and unwinding. But the real highlight? The teas were extra strong, delivering exactly what you’d want from a solid kava bar. Whether you’re there to relax or get social, their drinks hit just right.

Another bonus was the pool tables, adding a fun, laid-back element to the space. It’s always a plus when a kava bar offers more than just good drinks, and The Hideout nails it with the mix of great ambiance, quality beverages, and entertainment.

Overall, if you’re looking for a vibrant, welcoming kava spot with strong tea, a great crowd, and a comfortable setup, The Hideout Kava & Tea should definitely be on your list. We’ll be back for sure!

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

This kava bar is a hidden gem for anyone seeking a relaxed escape. The cozy, laid-back vibe instantly makes you feel at home, with a crowd as friendly as the space itself. The staff are a highlight, warm, approachable, and always ready with an excellent recommendation. Whether you’re a kava enthusiast or trying it for the first time, their attentive service ensures you’re in good hands. It’s the kind of place where you can unwind solo or catch up with friends, with a strong sense of community that keeps you coming back. The drinks are a standout, with a unique and thoughtfully crafted menu. Each sip feels like a treat, from soothing kava blends to other inventive options. The bar also shines as a social spot, with a welcoming energy that makes it perfect for casual hangouts or intimate gatherings. Regular events add an extra layer of charm, turning it into a lively yet relaxed hub. It’s a must-visit spot for locals and newcomers alike, offering a chill atmosphere you’ll want to return to again and again.
Fresh Kava, and Several Choices for Quality Teas. If you get hungry you can’t go wrong with the spring rolls and fried rice!!! Excellent staff. You are in great hands with Clara. 🥥

Island Vibes Kava in Pompano Beach offers a warm and inviting atmosphere with friendly staff who make you feel right at home. The kava tea is delightful and relaxing, while the pet-friendly environment adds a unique charm. A strong sense of community and care from the owners and staff fosters a welcoming vibe, making you feel like part of the family. With its laid-back ambiance and relaxing setting, it’s the perfect spot to unwind. Overall, this hidden gem delivers top-notch kava and tea paired with heartfelt hospitality for a truly unique experience.
love TFK🖤
love this place! Octavio is the best kavatender / bar owner to ever do it. The drinks are unmatched and so is the service.
Eric and Amy are the sweetest people around, the world is lucky that these two own a kava bar.
Love this bar!!!!!

Highly recommend. An elevated and opulent kava bar, the best I've experienced in South Florida yet! The tea is nice and strong, the staff is extremely nice and it's extremely well furnished. You have several spaces to kick back, do work, and enjoy your tea. If you want to spend your money right, come to Sunbelt. Plus Luke is super cute.
Love This Place ✅
Dan Doon is amazing and makes the best kava. He is polite and outgoing  \nI highly recommend coming to see him and tell him I sent you.

Sun Belt is such a nice bar! Dan Doon is absolutely awesome and the drinks here are A M A Z I N G! It's been a little while since I've been able to properly drink and appreciate kava and kratom. Absolutely recommend. The setting is nice, product is smooth, and its so relaxing to come here after work.
We love Sunbelt! Delicious draft kratom, smooth Kava, and a wonderful Kava Tender-\nDan Doon
Always an great vibe
Chill vibes and a great place to meet cool people! The place is clean and has a nice pool table. I always stop by while I’m in town. Kavatender Brooke was very attentive and knowledgeable!
I always enjoy coming here, Brooke is a amazing bartender and always makes awesome drinks. It's always a joy coming here, thank you for my drink Brooke it was delicious!
Brooke is honestly one of the best kava tenders in sflo by far. She s engaging and quick with orders. She does costal (the golden standard) justice!

Great bar, Great Atmosphere, I love that it’s veteran owned and they have a great selection of drinks, I prefer the odysseys very good mushroom drink. Big shout outs to the kava tenders and the whole staff. They also do open mics and have great local artists/talent performing, as well as myself. Vibes.

Wow — Coastal Kava & Coffee is AMAZING! From the moment I walked in, the energy was so positive and inviting. Brooke absolutely made the experience unforgettable! She’s not just a bartender, she’s a total vibe — so friendly, upbeat, and passionate about what she does. Every drink she made was spot-on, and she made everyone feel like part of the family. If you haven’t been yet, you’re seriously missing out. Huge shoutout to Brooke for making it such a fun and memorable visit! Can’t wait to come back!
Awesome place, great people and fantastic vibe!  If you haven’t yet, you should go!
Beautiful hidden gem in Delray. Great drinks & very dog friendly. Awesome place to work remotely. They also have events almost every night of the week.

Chiyo’s House Tea & Kava offers a laid-back, welcoming environment with friendly staff and a consistently positive vibe. It’s a great place to relax, connect, or simply enjoy a peaceful break from the day.\n\nOne of the best parts is that it’s pet friendly, so you can bring your furry friend along and feel right at home.

Brooke is a 10/10 kavatender and so are the rest of the staff that work here including management. The kava and tea are also super good and priced well, I recommend for anybody reading this to come by and check out the hype about coastal kava!!
Brooke is the vibe , always the best and her interactions help unwind during a hard day of work.\nAppreciate you
Genuinely my favorite kava bar in Daytona. Friendly staff, peaceful but fun atmosphere, great energy. Strong tea and high quality kava
Such a relaxing vibe here. The drinks are on point, and the energy in the space is calm and friendly. It’s the kind of place you walk into and instantly feel at ease.
10/10 best machiato EVER

Brooke at Coastal Kava Bar was an absolute rockstar — friendly, fast, and somehow managed to make the kava taste even better (pretty sure that’s magic). The atmosphere was chill in the best way — like your stress took a vacation.
I come here all the time and service is always great brooke, leah, and keisha are always nice and amazing the product is always good
Marcie was awesome! 😎

Clara and Jub don’t just serve kava—they serve vibes. These two are the heart of the bar, and they keep it flowing with just the right mix of chill, sass, and no-BS authenticity. Clara’s cool presence is like a deep exhale—you walk in tense, and somehow she melts it off you with a smirk and a shell. Jub? Pure fire. Quick with a joke, a wild story, or a perfectly timed eye-roll, they keep the energy alive and unfiltered. If you’re looking for robotic service, keep it moving. But if you want real connection and a damn good pour, Clara and Jub are your people.

Broward County’s newest kava lounge, House of Bula, is bright, modern, and immaculately clean.

The vibe is chill, the staff is welcoming, and the atmosphere feels like a breath of fresh air.

They’ve got a solid menu packed with both kava and kratom options, whether you’re a seasoned shell sipper or new to the scene, there’s something here for everyone.

And if you’re into blueberries, the “Violet” is an absolute must-try, sweet, smooth, and seriously delicious.
Excellent vibes
Excellent place very. Friendly people

The atmosphere is super relaxing and welcoming perfect for unwinding after a long day or catching up with friends. The staff was knowledgeable, friendly, and happy to explain the different kava and botanical options available. Jub, Clara & Bea are the best. 😄

Awesome kava bar with a super chill vibe and even better staff. Jub, Bea, and Clara are all amazing — friendly, welcoming, and they really know their stuff. Great drinks, great people, and the perfect spot to relax. Definitely a go-to in South Florida!
Best bartenders and genuine people !
Amazing 🤩 Vibes
Amazing Vibes 😀
Great bartenders and cozy atmosphere. Large choice of drinks and not only. Good place to find new friends!
The place was very cozy and the bartender was very friendly and helpful. I’m definitely coming back!!

Cool spot on a 2nd floor. So them having  a balcony is very nice. They have hookahs, so if thats your vibe, you can hang out on the balcony and enjoy one. Kelly and Nicole gave excellent service and we're attentive. There are restaurants in the same plaza, provides for tasty food options and a variety. The kava shots are popular, and they have both kratom brewed tea & special kratom extract drinks.
Amazing staff!!!
My absolute favorite bar!! It’s so beautiful & clean, and their staff is not only friendly, but extremely attentive and knowledgeable. I can’t recommend House of Bula enough!
Genuinely one of my absolute favorite bars in SoFlo. Super genuine people, never feels like a \
kind of bar, has tons of natural light, super contemporary feel inside and very high quality products. Regular shells and teas are all I need here, but having extracts to choose from is a huge plus.
Tally's first and best bar! Tons of history with awesome people and product, great for college age or older.
Number 1 kava bar in the US for 2025!!! 🥳🥳
Love hanging out with Aubrey and Zack behind the bar. Great tea and great prices. Vibes all around
5 plus star

Kalea Kava Bar is a bright and welcoming space that feels both spacious and cozy the moment you walk in. The atmosphere is perfect for relaxing with friends or unwinding after a long day. Their drink selection is impressive, offering a wide variety of kava and kratom options to suit every taste. I tried the Orange Creamsicle kratom drink, and it was absolutely amazing, smooth, refreshing, and full of flavor!

I love hanging out at Kalea with Hanz! I’m more of a daytime person, but it’s the perfect environment to get some work done during the day with the most relaxed vibes during the day and they also have awesome events at night! 6/5 stars!!
They closed :(
Love these guys. Been one of my go-to spots since they opened in 2023
Kalea is a fun, chill spot with great creative drinks, cool kavatenders, and great events. If anything ever gets me down to that part of Palm Bay, it’s Kalea and kavatenders Hanz and Hunter

Love the vibe at this kava bar. The place is very clean and the staff is attentive. The drinks are very well made and have many options of flavors, and extracts. The kava shots are amazing my favorite is the horchata shot. They have bogo times too.
Great bar, great service, best Kava around
Love this bar!
